titles.title: How deep the Father’s love for us

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: How deep the Father’s love for us, How vast beyond all measure, That He should give His only Son To make a wretch His treasure.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: How great the pain of searing loss – The Father turns His face away, As wounds which mar the Chosen One Bring many sons to glory.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Behold the man upon a cross, My sin upon His shoulders; Ashamed, I hear my mocking voice Call out among the scoffers.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: It was my sin that held Him there Until it was accomplished; His dying breath has brought me life – I know that it is finished.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I will not boast in anything, No gifts, no power, no wisdom; But I will boast in Jesus Christ, His death and resurrection.

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Why should I gain from His reward? I cannot give an answer; But this I know with all my heart – His wounds have paid my ransom.
